benefits.description: GLP1s seem to have biggest impact noticeably

protocol_notes: Mentioned 'lab rat' noticed huge difference from what appears to be BPC-157 (Wolverine reference) after a week. General advice about peptides: tell body to work better but require diet/exercise. Dosage matters - some run too low. Recommended 8-12 weeks. Some need to be run with others for full effect.
